ddls:
CREATE TABLE "aerodynamic_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the measurement */,
  "angle_of_attack" REAL /* Angle of attack in degrees */,
  "chord_length" REAL /* Chord length in meters */,
  "free_stream_velocity" REAL /* Free-stream velocity in m/s */,
  "section_side_displacement_thickness" REAL /* Section side displacement thickness */,
  "scaled_sound_pressure_level" REAL /* Scaled sound pressure level in dB */,
  "experiment_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association between experiment, measurement, and engineer */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the measurement was taken */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the measurement */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the measurement */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure during the measurement */,
  "wind_tunnel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wind tunnel used */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aerodynamic_measurements_experiment_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_measurement_id") REFERENCES experiment_measurements ("experiment_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aerodynamic_measurements_wind_tunnel_id FOREIGN KEY ("wind_tunnel_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Objective of the experiment */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the experiment is conducted */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project to which the experiment belongs */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supervisor of the experiment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES engineers ("engineer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the equipment */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the equipment */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the equipment */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "calibration_due_date" TEXT /* Date when the next calibration is due */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engineers" (
  "engineer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engineer */,
  "engineer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the engineer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the engineer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the engineer (e.g., lead engineer, data analyst) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the engineer */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the engineer */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the engineer's supervisor */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the engineer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engineer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engineers_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES engineers ("engineer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_measurements" (
  "experiment_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association between experiment, measurement, and engineer */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement */,
  "engineer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the engineer responsible for the measurement */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_measurements_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES aerodynamic_measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_measurements_engineer_id FOREIGN KEY ("engineer_id") REFERENCES engineers ("engineer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_measurements_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supervisor of the project */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES engineers ("engineer_id")
)
